title: columnea repens
intro: Columnea repens, also known as the creeping columnea or creeping goldfish plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to tropical America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Columnea repens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Columnea repens can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
